channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Games Transformed 2026 - 'Smash The Fash' Game Jam Hosted by Games Transformed , Our Move , 161bpm 1 Joined Overview Community Submissions open from 2026-03-29 00:00:00 to 2026-04-30 22:59:00 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam Games Transformed (a festival
